channel.title: CyberPulse
channel.description: Executive cyber intelligence briefings on cyber risk, AI threats, infrastructure exposure, and board-level decision-making.

item.title: CyberPulse Daily — The Defender Is in Scope
item.dc:creator: Tushar Vartak
item.description: CyberPulse Daily Brief for June 23, 2026: attackers are increasingly targeting the defensive layer itself — security tooling, OAuth grants, plugins, AI tenancy, and proxy infrastructure.
